codeReview.summary: The implementation creates a well-structured canonical module inventory at docs/modules/MODULE-INVENTORY.md that enumerates all 15 live backend modules with accurate ownership summaries and correct links to canonical documentation packets. The inventory is properly linked from docs/INDEX.md, and the stale status note about a future inventory was removed. All 18 links (15 module links + 3 cross-references) resolve correctly. The diff is docs-only (2 files, 48 insertions, 3 deletions) and stays within mission scope. The worker followed the docs-worker skill procedure faithfully, including evidence gathering, accuracy verification, and proper handoff.

issues.description: The 'production' module ownership summary says 'Catalog and product surfaces: brands, items, readiness, SKU setup, packaging material definitions, and product/variant management'. While this accurately reflects the module's current controller/service contents, the module name 'production' could be confused with factory-floor production. The architecture library describes 'production' as 'catalog/setup surfaces, items/brands/readiness/imports' and 'factory' as 'production logs, packing, packaging mappings, cost allocation, batch registration'. The inventory summary is consistent with the library, so this is a naming quirk in the codebase rather than a doc error — but a future clarification note could help readers avoid confusion.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The architecture library (.factory/library/architecture.md) already contains a complete canonical dependency edge map and domain lane classification that aligns with the module inventory. No gap here — just confirming that the library is well-maintained and the worker correctly used it as source truth.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: architecture.md lists the same 15 modules and the same ownership characterizations used in MODULE-INVENTORY.md

sharedStateObservations.observation: The inventory correctly uses relative paths from docs/modules/ to erp-domain/ via ../../ links, and cross-references use ../ for docs/ sibling files. This matches the existing link pattern in docs/INDEX.md. No convention gap.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All 18 links verified to resolve to existing paths

summary: PASS. The module inventory is complete and accurate. All 15 live backend modules are enumerated with correct ownership summaries and valid links to canonical documentation packets (4 AGENTS.md packets, 11 source-directory links with per-module-packet-pending markers). The inventory is reachable from docs/INDEX.md, passes lint-knowledgebase.sh, and the diff is clean docs-only. One non-blocking observation about the 'production' module naming potentially causing reader confusion with the 'factory' module, but the documentation accurately reflects the codebase reality. No blocking issues found.
